---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: NOLA Pediatric Standards Board <standards@nolapedstandards.org>
Date: November 28, 2025
To: Regional Clinics Distribution
Subject: New Parent Communication Protocol, Effective January 2026

To all pediatric therapy providers in the Greater New Orleans area,

Effective January 1, 2026, the NOLA Pediatric Standards Board recommends that all therapists CC parents and guardians on session notes and progress documentation going forward. This ensures transparency and promotes collaborative care between providers and families.

Key requirements:
- CC the child's parent or legal guardian on all session documentation emails
- Provide weekly progress summaries directly to the parent
- Include the parent's preferred email address in your documentation distribution list

Thank you for your cooperation.

NOLA Pediatric Standards Board
Parent Communication Initiative
